paired_sampling.method: deterministic fixed tables shared by COMSOL and SIMION
paired_sampling.production_particle_count: set by a versioned run config after convergence

rf_to_oatof_100amu_5eV.purpose: N=100 RF-to-oaTOF mean-energy matching candidate; preserves the official source as a separate regression point

oa_tof_readiness_524amu_5eV.purpose: future integration-readiness candidate; does not create a coupled model

policy: New masses or energies are added as named operating points; N=100 is the functional prefix of the N=1000 statistical source and neither table is overwritten by another operating point.
